structure.src/components: Reusable UI components including FaceCamera, Navbar, camera components
structure.src/pages: Page-level components: LoginPage, DashboardPage, BootstrapSetupPage, AdminPage, etc.
structure.src/services: API and service layer: api.ts, websocketService, locationService
structure.src/api: API endpoint wrappers: authApi, attendanceApi, faceManagementApi, leaveApi, etc.
structure.src/utils: Utility functions: fileUtils, errorHandler, logger, validators

criticalComponents.FaceCamera: Multi-frame capture component with auto-capture loop via requestAnimationFrame
criticalComponents.FaceLogin: Face authentication page with liveness detection and challenge-response
criticalComponents.BootstrapSetupPage: Admin bootstrap with face enrollment and password setup
criticalComponents.AuthContext: Global authentication state management with token refresh
criticalComponents.Navbar: Navigation with logout button and user menu

structure.modules/auth: Authentication endpoints: login, logout, refresh, face-login, register-face, bootstrap
structure.modules/face-management: Face profile CRUD and admin override functions
structure.modules/security: Security monitoring, audit logging, impossible travel detection
structure.middleware: Auth, error handling, logging, rate limiting, CORS

criticalEndpoints.POST /api/auth/bootstrap/setup: Initial admin setup with face enrollment

modules.face_detection: RetinaFace-based face detection with OpenCV fallback
modules.liveness_detection: Multi-frame liveness analysis with MediaPipe landmarks
modules.anti_spoof_detection: Liveness detection with blink + motion analysis

bugs: Error handling for failed frame processing

knownIssues.1_dualLogout: Multiple logout buttons/handlers creating inconsistent state cleanup
knownIssues.2_imageUpload: Internal server error during image upload - likely payload/validation issue
knownIssues.3_cameraFrames: Camera fails to capture frames consistently - stream lifecycle or closure issues
